title: MeekoCraft
description: A polished, vanilla-friendly modpack that aims to not stifle any vanilla gameplay and mechanics, while still being rich in modded content. Also, sponsored by a Pomeranian
body:
This modpack serves as an introduction to modded gameplay, while not infringing on vanilla gameplay/mechanics. This modpack utilizes a suite of mods that enhance many areas of the vanilla experience, such as adventuring, building, and even farming.

# Modpack Features

- Many optimizations for lower end computers
- A plethora of QOL additions that improve upon base gameplay
- An enhanced audio-visual experience with mods that improve upon ambient sounds, atmosphere, and sound physics
- Many content rich mods that range from plushies to interactable, pilotable boats and airships. All configured for the best defaults and balancing
- Pre-configured keybinds, mod configs, and settings that give the best experience without any cumbersome setting up process
- Utility mods that improve the playing experience both for vanilla and modded gameplay

**This modpack was made with multiplayer in mind**, thus included are many improvements to the multiplayer experience. Utilizing the Modrinth modpack format, an easy tool such as [mrpack-install](https://github.com/nothub/mrpack-installhttps://github.com/nothub/mrpack-install) can deploy and install a server for this modpack in just one command. This modpack is pre-configured and ready to play at the moment of installation, both client and server side.
